description: Production-Ready RFC Test Suite for TurboHttp Client Encoder/Decoder — 644 new test cases covering RFC 1945, 7230, 7231, 7233, 7540, 7541 across 47 focused user stories

userStories.title: HTTP/1.0 Encoder — Request-Line tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive request-line tests for the HTTP/1.0 encoder so that RFC 1945 §5.1 compliance is verified. Add tests to Http10EncoderTests.cs covering method casing, URI normalization, query strings, percent-encoding, and fragment stripping.
acceptanceCriteria: 1945-enc-001: Request-line starts with METHOD path HTTP/1.0\r\n
1945-enc-007: Path + query string preserved in request-line
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures

userStories.title: HTTP/1.0 Encoder — Header Suppression tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying that the HTTP/1.0 encoder correctly suppresses HTTP/1.1-only headers and validates header values. Add tests to Http10EncoderTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: enc1-hdr-001: Every header line ends with \r\n, no bare \n
enc1-hdr-002: Custom header name casing preserved (P1)
enc1-hdr-003: Multiple custom headers all emitted (P1)
enc1-hdr-004: Semicolon in header value preserved verbatim (P1)
enc1-hdr-005: NUL byte in header value throws ArgumentException
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures

acceptanceCriteria: 1945-enc-008: Binary body bytes match input exactly
enc1-body-001: Body with null bytes not truncated
enc1-body-002: 2 MB body with correct Content-Length (P1)
enc1-body-003: \r\n\r\n separates headers from body exactly
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures

dec1-hdr-002: Response with zero headers accepted

userStories.title: HTTP/1.0 Decoder — Body Parsing tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests for HTTP/1.0 body parsing covering Content-Length, EOF-terminated, and no-body response rules. Add tests to Http10DecoderTests.cs.

1945-7-003: No Content-Length → read until EOF via TryDecodeEof

userStories.title: Security — HTTP/1.1 Input Limits tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want security limit tests for header count, header block size, and body size in the HTTP/1.1 decoder. Create src/TurboHttp.Tests/Http11SecurityTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: sec-001a: 100 headers accepted at default limit
sec-001b: 101 headers rejected above default limit
sec-001c: Custom header count limit respected (P1)
sec-003a: Body at 10 MB limit accepted
sec-003c: Zero body limit rejects any body (P1)
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures
userStories.notes: Open question: confirm default header count limit (100) and body size limit (10 MB) before implementing.

userStories.title: Security — HTTP Smuggling + State Isolation tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want security tests for request smuggling defenses and decoder state isolation. Add tests to src/TurboHttp.Tests/Http11SecurityTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: sec-005b: CRLF injection in header value rejected → InvalidFieldValue
sec-005c: NUL byte in decoded header value rejected → InvalidFieldValue
sec-006a: Reset() after partial headers restores clean state
sec-006b: Reset() after partial body restores clean state

userStories.title: Security — HTTP/2 Limits + Protocol Protection tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want security tests for HTTP/2 protocol limits including HPACK size limits and rapid-reset protection. Create src/TurboHttp.Tests/Http2SecurityTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: sec-h2-001: HPACK literal name exceeding limit → HpackException
sec-h2-002: HPACK literal value exceeding limit → HpackException
sec-h2-004: 100 streams immediately RST'd triggers protection (P1, CVE-2023-44487)
sec-h2-008: Unknown SETTINGS ID silently ignored (P1)
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures
userStories.notes: Open question: confirm whether HTTP/2 decoder has rapid-reset detection for CVE-2023-44487 before implementing sec-h2-004.

userStories.title: Round-Trip — HTTP/1.1 Encode → Decode tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want 20 end-to-end round-trip tests encoding HTTP/1.1 requests and decoding the responses to verify encoder/decoder consistency. Create src/TurboHttp.Tests/Http11RoundTripTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: rt11-001 through rt11-020: 20 round-trip scenarios implemented (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD, OPTIONS, chunked, redirect, binary, pipelined, keep-alive, etc.)
Every scenario: encoded bytes decode to semantically equivalent message
dotnet test ./src/TurboHttp.sln passes with zero failures

userStories.title: Round-Trip — HTTP/2 Encode → Decode tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want 15 end-to-end round-trip tests for HTTP/2 covering the full protocol lifecycle. Create src/TurboHttp.Tests/Http2RoundTripTests.cs.
acceptanceCriteria: rt2-001 through rt2-015: 15 round-trip scenarios implemented (preface, SETTINGS exchange, concurrent streams, HPACK reuse, PING/PONG, GOAWAY, RST_STREAM, flow control, PUSH_PROMISE, etc.)
Every scenario: encoded frames decode to correct protocol state
